purpose_context: Mission artifact writes/reads (task and status files) bypass the existing single resolution authority in places, blocking work packages on phantom unchecked-subtasks (#2154) and silently dropping status writes (#2155), and leaving the handle-divergence class #2164 fixed only at named sites with no guard against regression. This mission routes the bypassing write legs through the canonical kind-aware authority and adds architectural call-site gates that make a future bypass a CI failure.
purpose_tldr: Stop the implement/review loop blocking on coord-vs-primary surface splits, and make the mission-path resolution boundary impossible to silently diverge again.
